reasoning: Lactate clearance is your primary physiological limiter. In your last ride, you maintained low intensity; now it's crucial to engage higher effort levels to develop aerobic capacity and fatigue resistance. This workout aligns with your target to sustain 220-235W on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Repeat 5x: 5 min at 242W, 3 min at 218W, then 2 min at 256W
